name: Navigateurs
description: Navigateurs alternatifs a Firefox (deja installe sur Nobara)

external.name: Brave Browser
external.description: Navigateur Brave axe vie privee (depot officiel)
external.cmd: sudo bash -c 'rpm --import https://brave-browser-rpm-release.s3.brave.com/brave-core.asc && curl -sSLo /etc/yum.repos.d/brave-browser.repo https://brave-browser-rpm-release.s3.brave.com/brave-browser.repo && dnf install -y brave-browser'
